zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Whiting於1462年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，她的父親Sir Thomas Whiting27歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Tims23歲。她於1490年與John Jeanes在英國英格蘭薩默塞特謝普頓 馬利特結婚。她去世於1502年在英國英格蘭倫敦享年40歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特謝普頓 馬利特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Whiting于1462年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Whiting27岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Tims23岁。她于1490年与John Jeanes在英国英格兰薩默塞特謝普頓 馬利特结婚。她去世于1502年在英国英格兰倫敦享年40岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特謝普頓 馬利特。

nameMeanings.name: Whiting
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Whiting (Old English Hwīting, a patronymic from the personal name Hwīta, from hwīt ‘white’ applied as a nickname).
History: Rev. Samuel Whiting arrived in Boston, MA, in May 1636, and made his home in Lynn, MA.

variants.name: Witting
meanings: North German: habitational name from a place called Wittingen, near Braunschweig.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Whiting was born in 1462, in London, Middlesex, England, her father, Sir Thomas Whiting, was 27 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Tims, was 23. She married John Jeanes in 1490, in Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. She died in 1502, in London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40, and was buried in Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Whiting est née en 1462, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Whiting, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Tims, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé John Jeanes en 1490, à Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée en 1502, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Whiting 1462 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Whiting 27 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Tims 23. Sie hat 1490 in Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England, United Kingdom John Jeanes geheiratet. Sie starb 1502 im Alter von 40 Jahren in London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Whiting è nata il nel 1462 nel London, Middlesex, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Whiting, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Tims, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato John Jeanes nel 1490, nel Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1502, nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Whitingが1462年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Whitingは27歳，母Lady Elizabeth Timsは23歳であった。1490年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトシェプトン マレットでJohn Jeanesと結婚した。彼女は1502年にイギリスイギリスロンドンで40歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトシェプトン マレットにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Whiting(이)가 1462년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Whiting(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Tims(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 셰프턴 맬렛에서 John Jeanes(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1502년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 셰프턴 맬렛에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Whiting родилась в 1462 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Whiting было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Tims, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Jeanes в 1490 г. в местности шептон маллет, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла в 1502 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности шептон маллет, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Whiting nació en 1462, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Whiting, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Tims, tenía 23 años. Se casó con John Jeanes en 1490, en Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1502, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultada en Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Inglaterra.
